title: Neighbourhood Survey | Anna Dixon MP
text_excerpt: --> Neighbourhood Survey | Anna Dixon MP top of page ​Anna Dixon MP Home About Me Contact Surgeries and Advice Neighbourhood Survey Anna's Visits My Priorities Latest News Speeches and Questions Email Sign Up Privacy Policy Acceptable Behaviour Policy More Use tab to navigate through the menu items. Neighbourhood Survey Fill out my survey below and let me know your priorities for you local community. First name Last name Email Postcode What do you enjoy most about living in your area? Which of the following matter the most to you? (Select Multiple) Local roads and footpaths Crime and anti-social behaviour Public transport Community centres and services Playgrounds and green spaces Health and care services Housing Education and employment support Culture and leisure facilities Other What would be the one change or improvment you would like to see in you community? Explain below: I want to keep up to date with the activites of Anna Dixon MP by signing up to recieve her email newsletter. Submit Thank you! Your form has been submitted. This data is collected by Anna Dixon MP. Anna Dixon MP does not share any of your personal data or any of the answers you have provided in any surveys. Personal information is only kept for as long as it is necessary to fulfil the purpose for which it was collected. To understand more about how your personal data is used, please visit: https://www.annadixonmp.co.uk/privacy-policy or contact Anna Dixon MP via email on info@annadixonmp.co.uk . © 2024 by Office of Anna Dixon MP.
